name: @faraday/runtime
description: The Faraday runtime layer (ui, blocks, runtime, styles, world, lms, lib). Vendored verbatim into generated lessons under src/faraday/** by @faraday-kit/cli and locked with a SHA-256 manifest — the source of truth for the copied-in code, not an installed dependency. Its sources import via the '@/faraday/*' alias that only resolves inside a generated project, so it is typechecked there rather than in isolation.
